name: Jju
notes: Jju (Kaje), a Plateau (Niger-Congo) language of Kaduna State, Nigeria. STUB: the grapheme inventory is NOT yet specified. Script: Latin alphabet. A full spec must model lexical tone and the language's vowel system; the orthography is not widely standardised and no normative letter-to-phoneme table was found. Wikidata supplies no ISO 639-3 or Glottolog code for this item (which is the Jju Wikipedia), so those fields are left null rather than guessed. Input is assumed to be the Latin Jju orthography. wikidata_qid left unset: the code's Wikidata row resolves to the Wikimedia project item, not the language item; not recorded rather than record a wrong id.
